document.title: ADI MAIN
document.revisionOrVersion: V007; title block also shows Rev 006 or <RevCode>

sourceSummary.oneLine: ADI MAIN schematic for HAD1717MC showing revision history, sheet title blocks, connectors, power rails, FPGA, i.MX6, DDR3, USB, Ethernet, eMMC, and PCIe circuitry.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Engineering circuit diagram used as safety submission material; no regulatory approval status, authority decision, or compliance standard is stated.
keyPoints: Title block identifies the document as ADI MAIN with 30 sheets.

Main functional sections include MAIN INPUT CONNECTOR, POWER MAIN INPUT POWER-GATE IC, POWER-PMIC/SUB, POWER-FPGA, PMIC LDO Outputs, FPGA control, i.MX6, DDR3, USB, RGMII Ethernet, eMMC memory, SPI NOR flash, and Mini-PCIE.
No authority, jurisdiction, regulatory status, certificate number, or safety standard is present in the extracted text.

evidence.claim: The document title is ADI MAIN.

evidence.evidenceText: Date: Sheet of ... ADI MAIN A3 ... Tuesday, December 26, 2023

evidence.claim: The document includes a main input connector and ROIC connector section.

evidence.claim: The schematic includes an FPGA device EP4CE30F23I7N.
The schematic includes i.MX6 processor circuitry.
The schematic specifies DDR3 operating notes for i.MX6 Quad and i.MX6 Solo.
evidence.evidenceText: i.MX6 QUAD ==> DDR3-1066 i.MX6 SOLO ==> DDR3-800

evidence.claim: The schematic includes 8GB eMMC memory and 4Mb SPI NOR flash.
The schematic includes an AR8031 Ethernet PHY.
